name: Phishing Link Access
description: Detects access to known phishing or suspicious URLs from internal hosts
query:
// Phishing/Malicious URL Access
// Internal host accessing known bad or suspicious domains
events from proxy
where category = "phishing" or category = "malware"
  or url contains "login" and url contains "verify"
group by source_ip, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
